heading: Regulatory treatment of video programming services
label: 571 Regulatory treatment of video programming services

children.heading: Radio-based systems
children.label: 1 Radio-based systems
children.text: To the extent that a common carrier (or any other person) is providing video programming to subscribers using radio communication, such carrier (or other person) shall be subject to the requirements of subchapter III and , but shall not otherwise be subject to the requirements of this subchapter.section 572 of this title

children.heading: Common carriage of video traffic
children.label: 2 Common carriage of video traffic
children.text: To the extent that a common carrier is providing transmission of video programming on a common carrier basis, such carrier shall be subject to the requirements of subchapter II and , but shall not otherwise be subject to the requirements of this subchapter. This paragraph shall not affect the treatment under of a facility of a common carrier as a cable system.section 572 of this titlesection 522(7)(C) of this title

children.heading: Cable systems and open video systems
children.label: 3 Cable systems and open video systems
A
children.text: such carrier shall be subject to the requirements of this subchapter, unless such programming is provided by means of an open video system for which the Commission has approved a certification under ; orsection 573 of this title

children.label: B
children.text: if such programming is provided by means of an open video system for which the Commission has approved a certification under , such carrier shall be subject to the requirements of this part, but shall be subject to parts I through IV of this subchapter only as provided in 573(c) of this title.section 573 of this title

children.heading: Election to operate as open video system
children.label: 4 Election to operate as open video system
children.text: A common carrier that is providing video programming in a manner described in paragraph (1) or (2), or a combination thereof, may elect to provide such programming by means of an open video system that complies with . If the Commission approves such carrier’s certification under , such carrier shall be subject to the requirements of this part, but shall be subject to parts I through IV of this subchapter only as provided in 573(c) of this title.section 573 of this titlesection 573 of this title

children.heading: Limitations on interconnection obligations
children.label: b Limitations on interconnection obligations
children.text: A local exchange carrier that provides cable service through an open video system or a cable system shall not be required, pursuant to subchapter II of this chapter, to make capacity available on a nondiscriminatory basis to any other person for the provision of cable service directly to subscribers.

children.heading: Additional regulatory relief
children.label: c Additional regulatory relief
children.text: A common carrier shall not be required to obtain a certificate under with respect to the establishment or operation of a system for the delivery of video programming.section 214 of this title
